name: possiblaw-plugins
description: PossibLaw plugin marketplace: dual-host governance starter pack and legal-app design grill.

plugins.name: possiblaw-starter
plugins.description: Dual-host (Claude + Codex) governance pack with state-artifact pipeline (PLAN/TEST/REVIEW/HANDOFF), role registry, continuity checkpoints, and runtime guardrails (Claude only). Codex users continue using the bootstrap installer in the same repo.

plugins.name: possiblaw-vibe
plugins.description: Legal-app design grill in the spirit of Matt Pocock's grill-me skill. Walks document systems, software systems, workflows, data model, and integrations through relentless interrogation until the spec is real.
